description: SPRS scoring weights (NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Methodology v1.2.1 Annex A) and CMMC 2.0 level mappings, keyed by Rev 3 identifier form. point_value is the SPRS deduction weight (5/3/1; 0 for the unscored SSP requirement 03.12.04). cmmc_level 1 marks the 17 FAR 52.204-21-mapped foundational practices.
source: 32 CFR 170.21 / NIST SP 800-171 DoD Assessment Methodology v1.2.1 Annex A
